transactions.description: New York Yankees placed 3B Ryan McMahon on the 10-day injured list retroactive to June 22, 2026. Throat infection.
New York Yankees recalled 3B Oswaldo Cabrera from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees activated C Ali Sánchez from the paternity list.
New York Yankees optioned C J.C. Escarra to Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees placed RHP David Bednar on the paternity list.
New York Yankees recalled RHP Jake Bird from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees recalled RHP Yovanny Cruz from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees optioned RHP Yerry De los Santos to Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
